worst_setup_slack_ps.rationale: Setup closure should remain non-negative on the golden timing sample.

worst_hold_slack_ps.rationale: Hold closure should remain non-negative on the golden timing sample.

equivalence_pass_rate.rationale: Golden verify samples should stay fully equivalent.

counterexample_count.rationale: No unexpected counterexample is allowed in golden verify runs.

worst_max_abs_v.rationale: Golden waveform drift should stay below 2mV.

failing_deck_count.rationale: Golden simulation decks should not produce threshold failures.
